original_query: with sr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(sr_return_quantity) sr_item_qty  from store_returns,       item,       date_dim  where sr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim 	where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  where d_date in ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')))  and   sr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 and 100  and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 271 and 300  and sr_reason_sk in (3, 20, 40, 43, 51) group by i_item_id),  cr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(cr_return_quantity) cr_item_qty  from catalog_returns,       item,       date_dim  where cr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 	  	  where d_date in ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')))  and   cr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 and 100  and cr_return_amount / cr_return_quantity between 271 and 300  and cr_reason_sk in (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)  group by i_item_id),  wr_items as  (select i_item_id item_id,         sum(wr_return_quantity) wr_item_qty  from web_returns,       item,       date_dim  where wr_item_sk = i_item_sk  and   d_date    in 	(select d_date 	from date_dim   where d_month_seq in 		(select d_month_seq 		from date_dim 			  where d_date in ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')))  and   wr_returned_date_sk   = d_date_sk  and i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')  and i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 and 100  and wr_return_amt / wr_return_quantity between 271 and 300  and wr_reason_sk in (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)  group by i_item_id)   select  sr_items.item_id        ,sr_item_qty        ,sr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 sr_dev        ,cr_item_qty        ,cr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 cr_dev        ,wr_item_qty        ,wr_item_qty/(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 * 100 wr_dev        ,(sr_item_qty+cr_item_qty+wr_item_qty)/3.0 average  from sr_items      ,cr_items      ,wr_items  where sr_items.item_id=cr_items.item_id    and sr_items.item_id=wr_items.item_id  order by sr_items.item_id          ,sr_item_qty  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_seqs AS (
    SELECT d_month_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_date IN ('2002-02-09','2002-04-16','2002-07-16','2002-10-28')
),
item_filtered AS (
    SELECT i_item_id, i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Home', 'Jewelry')
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 91 AND 100
),
sr_items AS (
    SELECT i.i_item_id AS item_id,
           SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sr_item_qty
    FROM store_returns sr
    JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs)
      AND sr.sr_return_amt BETWEEN 271 * sr.sr_return_quantity AND 300 * sr.sr_return_quantity
      AND sr.sr_reason_sk IN (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
),
cr_items AS (
    SELECT i.i_item_id AS item_id,
           SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS cr_item_qty
    FROM catalog_returns cr
    JOIN item_filtered i ON cr.cr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cr.cr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs)
      AND cr.cr_return_amount BETWEEN 271 * cr.cr_return_quantity AND 300 * cr.cr_return_quantity
      AND cr.cr_reason_sk IN (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
),
wr_items AS (
    SELECT i.i_item_id AS item_id,
           SUM(wr_return_quantity) AS wr_item_qty
    FROM web_returns wr
    JOIN item_filtered i ON wr.wr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON wr.wr_returned_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs)
      AND wr.wr_return_amt BETWEEN 271 * wr.wr_return_quantity AND 300 * wr.wr_return_quantity
      AND wr.wr_reason_sk IN (3, 20, 40, 43, 51)
    GROUP BY i.i_item_id
)
SELECT 
    sr.item_id,
    sr.sr_item_qty,
    sr.sr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS sr_dev,
    cr.cr_item_qty,
    cr.cr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS cr_dev,
    wr.wr_item_qty,
    wr.wr_item_qty / (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 * 100 AS wr_dev,
    (sr.sr_item_qty + cr.cr_item_qty + wr.wr_item_qty) / 3.0 AS average
FROM sr_items sr
JOIN cr_items cr ON sr.item_id = cr.item_id
JOIN wr_items wr ON sr.item_id = wr.item_id
ORDER BY sr.item_id, sr.sr_item_qty
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Simplified the nested subqueries for date filtering by creating a date_seqs CTE that extracts the month sequences once, then using d_month_seq IN (SELECT d_month_seq FROM date_seqs) in each returns CTE.
Created an item_filtered CTE to pre-filter items by category and manager_id once, reducing redundant filtering in each returns CTE.

Replaced division operations (return_amt / return_quantity between 271 and 300) with multiplication (return_amt BETWEEN 271 * return_quantity AND 300 * return_quantity) to avoid expensive division operations.
Replaced comma-based joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potentially better query optimization.
